creator: imriz@co.zahav.net.il
text:
Hi,

I have not tried it yet. This is a production machine, so I will have to
wait for the next maintenance window (as this can only be set at boot
time). I will update the PR as soon as I can apply this change.

Many thanks! :)
 =20

-----Original Message-----
From: Gleb Smirnoff [mailto:glebius@FreeBSD.org]=20
Sent: Wednesday, September 27, 2006 4:34 PM
To: Imri Zvik
Cc: freebsd-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: kern/103256: [em] em0: watchdog timeout -- resetting
(6.1-STABLE)

On Wed, Sep 27, 2006 at 07:30:27AM +0000, Imri Zvik wrote:
I>  I doubt this is an issue of unlogged events now being logged, as I
also
I>  see stalls in traffic when those timeouts occur, a thing I did not
have
I>  before.

What if you try debug.mpsafenet=3D0?

--=20
Totus tuus, Glebius.
GLEBIUS-RIPN GLEB-RIPE
